title: The African Development Bank Act, 1983
full_text: The African Development Bank Act, 1983 अफ्रीकी विकास बैंक अधिनियम, 1983 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198313 Act Number: 13 Enactment Date: 1983-05-26 Act Year: 1983 Short Title: The African Development Bank Act, 1983 Hindi Title: अफ्रीकी विकास बैंक अधिनियम, 1983 Long Title: An Act to implement the international agreement for the establishment and operation of the African Development Bank and for matters concerned therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Economic Affairs Enforcement Date: 15-12-1983 Notification: 15th December, 1983, vide notification No. G.S.R. 889(E), dated 14th December, 1983, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Last Updated: 01-04-2019 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The African Development Bank Act, 1983 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Payments to Bank. Section 4. Reserve Bank to be depository for Bank. Section 5. Conferment of status and certain immunities, exemptions and privileges on Bank and conferment of certain immunities, exemptions and privileges on its officers and employees. Section 6. Power to make rules. Section 7. Notifications issued under section 5 and rules made under section 6 to be laid before Parliament. Schedule 1.
